description: Minimal stub roster + interactions for the boarding-school prototype theme. Expand when art/data work resumes.

faculty: State your name and your business at this academy.
I trust you have a hall pass for whatever this is.
student: Don't get caught out after curfew.
Library's closed if you're looking for cover.
staff: Mind the rake. Mind the path. Mind your own.
If you're here to dig something up, don't.
law: Conduct yourself as a credit to this institution.
Detention starts whenever I decide it does.
peasant: Class is in session. Quietly, please.

faculty: {relation_name} thinks no one notices the late nights. I notice.
student: {relation_name} owes me a favour from term break. Don't ask.
staff: Heard {relation_name} arguing in the courtyard again. Same hour, same voices.
